Findings.Title: Workflow has expression-injection sink
Findings.Detail: zizmor rule template-injection: .github/workflows/ci.yml line 42 interpolates github.event.issue.title into a run script.
Findings.Remediation: Move untrusted input to env: and use $VAR in the run script.

Findings.Title: Action used by tag, not SHA
Findings.Detail: actions/checkout@v4 referenced by tag instead of SHA in 3 workflows.
Findings.Remediation: Pin to SHA per repo SHA-pinning policy.

Findings.Title: No dangerous-trigger usage
Findings.Detail: No pull_request_target with checkout of head ref.
